summary: Clean SBD capture of an underrated 1982 second set featuring a scorching Scarlet>Fire, fierce Eyes, shredding NFA and beautiful Stella Blue.
review: The recording is praised for its low‑hiss, crisp soundboard source that lets the band’s relaxed, jazzy vibe shine through. Reviewers hail the second set as one of the best of ’82, highlighting Scarlet>Fire, Eyes, The New Fast Automatic and Stella Blue as standout moments.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers gave 4–5 stars, emphasizing both superb sound quality and an exceptional second‑set performance.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as a clean SBD source with noticeably less hiss than other board recordings; crisp and clear throughout.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set is bouncy and jam‑heavy, recalling the relaxed jazzy feel of the 1977 era while delivering tight transitions and extended improvisations.
